tabs.body:
1.  Copy/paste files 

   ```
    sudo cp [src_file] [new_file] 
   ```

     Contoh : sudo cp /home/larona/Desktop/file.txt /home/larona/Desktop/file_copy.txt

   *  copy/paste directories 

     ```
      sudo cp -R [folder] [destination] 
     ```
   * overwrite existing file 

     ```
      sudo cp -f [src_file][new_file] 
     ```
2.  Move/rename files 

   ```
    sudo mv [src_file] [new_file] 
   ```

     Contoh : sudo mv /home/larona/Downloads/image.png /home/larona/Pictures/photo.png
3. Upload files to the server 

   ```
    scp -i [private key] -r [source path] [username]@[IP]:[target path] 
   ```

     Contoh : scp -i Desktop/private_key.pem Documents/file.txt root@cloud.larona.id:/var/www/file.txt
4.  Download files from the server 

   ```
    scp -i [private key] -r [username]@[IP]:[source path] [target path] 
   ```

     Contoh : scp -i Desktop/private_key.pem root@cloud.larona.id:/var/www/file.txt Documents/file.txt
5.  Connect to server 

   ```
    ssh -i [private key] [username]@[IP] 
   ```

     Contoh : ssh -i Desktop/private_key.pem ubuntu@cloud.larona.id
6. Archive file 

   * zip file 

     ```
      zip archive.zip file1.txt file2.txt file3.txt 
     ```
   * tar.gz file 

     ```
      tar -zcf archive.tar.gz file1.txt file2.txt file3.txt 
     ```
   * tar.xz file 

     ```
      tar -cJf archive.tar.xz file1.txt file2.txt file3.txt 
     ```

       Contoh : zip Documents/archive.zip Documents/file1.txt Documents/file2.txt
7.  Extract file 

   * zip file 

     ```
      unzip file.zip 
     ```
   * tar.gz file 

     ```
      tar -zxvf file.tar.gz 
     ```
   * tar.xz file 

     ```
      tar -xf file.tar.xz 
     ```

       Contoh : unzip Downloads/archive.zip
8.  Install .deb builds 

   ```
    sudo dpkg -i file.deb 
   ```
9. Find files 

   ```
    sudo find [source path] -name "*extention" 
   ```

     Contoh : sudo find /var/www/ -name "*.tar.xz"

3. Restore database 

   ```javascript

   ```

     Contoh : mysql -u root -p database1 < sql_file.sql


   * with another database structure only 


4. Copy table from another database 

   ```javascript

   ```

   Contoh : 	

   \> CREATE TABLE table2 LIKE database1.table1;

   \> INSERT INTO TABLE \[table] SELECT * FROM \[db_name].\[table];
5. Print query for certain tables/columns (from information_schema) 

   ```javascript

   ```

    Contoh : SELECT CONCAT('DELETE FROM ', TABLE_NAME, ';') FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = "database1" AND TABLE_NAME LIKE "t%"
6. Get (estimate) sum of database records 

   ```javascript

   ```

     Contoh : SELECT SUM(NUM_ROWS) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.INNODB_TABLESTATS WHERE NAME = '\[database1]';
7. Get each table size of a database 

   ```javascript

   ```

    Contoh : SELECT TABLE_NAME AS \`Table\`, ROUND((DATA_LENGTH + INDEX_LENGTH) / 1024 / 1024) AS \`Size (MB)\` FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = "larona_pr" ORDER BY (DATA_LENGTH + INDEX_LENGTH) DESC;
